snippet.title: Spider-Noir - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Next month, the web starts to unravel. Watch the new trailer for â€œSpider-Noirâ€‌ â€“ a live-action series starring Nicolas Cage â€“ arriving in both Authentic Black & White and True-Hue Full Color May 27.  

Will be available in English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam and Kannada. 


Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/primevideoin/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN


ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages â€“ including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal â€“ The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Videoâ€™s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures â€“ Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Hentok Konyak - Nyu Wan Wao (Official Music Video) @Aphewangsa
snippet.description:
My First Original Song â€” A Tribute to My Mother

This debut original composition is a deeply personal tribute to my mother, whose passing when I was six years old profoundly influenced the course of my life. This piece reflects a journey of love, loss, and resilience, carried forward by her enduring memory.


Written & Composed by: Hentok Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/hentok_konyak?igsh=ZmNkZ2lrZGozOXY2


Cast:

â€¢Aphe Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/aphe_cooks_and_vlogs2712?igsh=ams4aXZ5Z2x3M3dh
â€¢Rathai
â€¢Amenla Pongenhttps://www.instagram.com/amen90105?igsh=cmV0bHdjeTE1bW4w


Video Credits:

â€¢Cinematography by Studio LAGOMhttps://www.instagram.com/studiolagom__?igsh=dGV4Y2VnM3o3anZ4
â€¢Directed by Akum Denhttps://www.instagram.com/aakumden?igsh=c3p0ODY0ejVjMTlh
â€¢Viky Meiteihttps://www.instagram.com/vm_videosolution?igsh=MWN6cHJvNW5qdnljdA==
â€¢Manminder Singhhttps://www.instagram.com/manni0.9?igsh=cWV4bTVueno3Z2tl


Script Written by: Chongboi Singsonhttps://www.instagram.com/writes_cb?igsh=aTRwOWQ1eTBqanlw



Lyrics Translated by: Leiwang Thttps://www.instagram.com/_alei_yanlem?igsh=dWZzOXZtczRzY3Fk


Special Thanks:

We extend our sincere gratitude to Mr. & Mrs. Tongnyei Konyak for permitting us to feature their children.


Special thanks to Miss Amenla Pongen & Mrs. Pheying Konyak for coordinating the children for the video cast.


We are also grateful to Mr. & Mrs. Tashi Ozukum for generously providing their home, along with their warm hospitality and invaluable support throughout the production.





LYRICS 

Verse 1
Kahtok nyu me أ¼ya tuh shأ¼o 
Hongli mongmei pu yأ¼nang pe
Nyem ha me muh khah ha min pha
Puhpu humnung nyu li phei me

Chorus 
Onyu nang e puhpu nang ha tأ¼o 
Nang ngoh pu nyoi te yah tei yah
Nyu wan wao e أ¼-أ¼yin mأ¼kphe shaha
Phei nyih nyu a lin kأ؛m

Verse 2
Shin mang me nge pu te nohoi
Mangmeng أ¼ja she ie nang ki
Onyu tأ¼me ame hأ¼o hah
Hأ¼o lak nyoi أ¼te ie tأ¼m pha


Verse 3
Puhpu humnung nyu yأ¼nang ma
Noksha phongjong wing e mah nang
Yoi nyu mongmeng ne tah tأ؛m hah 
Li phei me yung pu jajang ja

Verse 4
Shaji onyu nang ha tأ¼o a
Nang monghum lak ju ngoi tأ¼ki
Nang ha أ¼kem pa yung shon pu
Ngao wing jai ya ken pu onyu..

#mothersday #song #tribute #emotional #song #truestory #hentok #konyak

en.description:
My First Original Song â€” A Tribute to My Mother

This debut original composition is a deeply personal tribute to my mother, whose passing when I was six years old profoundly influenced the course of my life. This piece reflects a journey of love, loss, and resilience, carried forward by her enduring memory.


Written & Composed by: Hentok Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/hentok_konyak?igsh=ZmNkZ2lrZGozOXY2

Special Thanks:

We extend our sincere gratitude to Mr. & Mrs. Tongnyei Konyak for permitting us to feature their children.


Special thanks to Miss Amenla Pongen & Mrs. Pheying Konyak for coordinating the children for the video cast.

snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studiosâ€™ first-ever foray into the genre, â€œClayfaceâ€‌ is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

â€œClayfaceâ€‌ unravels one manâ€™s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of oneâ€™s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkinsâ€™ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, â€œClayface.â€‌ The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.title: Kya Mausum Aaya Hai | Anari Movie Song | Udit Narayan, Sadhana Sargam | Hindi Gana
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song Name : Kya Mausam Aaya Hai
Singer : Sadhana Sargam, Udit Narayan
Music Director: Anand Shrivastav, Milind Shrivastav
Lyrics by: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Director:  K. Muralimohana Rao
Star Cast: Karishma Kapoor, Venkatesh, Suresh Oberoi

Lyrics : 
Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Kaaton se ho jaye paon na ghayal
Kaaton pe naachungi bandh ke mein payal
Ghar nahi yeh to
Kutiya humari hai

Yeh teri kutiya to mehalo se pyaari hai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Behti pawan ki
Ujaale gagan ki
Jee karta hai saath chalu

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Behti pawan ki
Ujaale gagan ki
Jee karta hai saath chalu

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Dharti pe bekhren hai
Oos ke moti

Yeh teri boli to
Sur naye peeroti

Dard ka woh agan

Mein chod ke aaye
Kya tujhe jaannat ki raunka nahi bhai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai.

Watch how Franklin builds his empire, dominates enemies, and takes control of everything in Los Santos. This is not just gameplay â€” this is a full cinematic experience with intense moments and unexpected twists.

snippet.title: Franklin Protects Magic Canvas! ًںک± Brainrots Attack GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin Protects the Magic Canvas! ًںک± Brainrots Attack GTA 5 Malayalam

Part 2 of the Magic Canvas story continues with Franklin, Shinchan & Pinchan testing their new water slides created using the magic canvas! ًںژ¨ًں’¦ But while everything looks fun, a hidden danger is already getting closerâ€¦ ًںک¨

Three brainrots arrive near the shore searching for the magic canvas. They disguise themselves as humans and trick Michael to find out where the canvas is hidden. ًں‘€

Franklin becomes suspicious and starts searching for Michael. Soon, he discovers the truth â€” the brainrots are planning to attack and take the MAGIC CANVAS! ًںک±

To keep it safe, Pinchan draws a flying plane using the canvas, and Shinchan escapes with it. But the flight goes out of control and they crash land on a mountain! âœˆï¸ڈًں’¥

As the brainrots attack, Franklin rushes in to protect the magic canvas. In the final fight, Pinchan creates a powerful magic wand and Franklin uses it to defeat the brainrots and save the canvas! âڑ،ًں”¥

Will the magic canvas stay safe? Or will the brainrots return again?

ًں‘‰ Watch till the end for a thrilling fight, suspense, and action-packed moments!

snippet.description:
ًں’– Dive into the soulful world of Alka Yagnik and Udit Narayan with 'Ek Masoom Sa Chehra', a timeless gem from the 2000s! ًں’– Experience the magic of their voices as they weave a tale of innocent love and heartfelt emotions. This song, from the movie Zinda Dil, is a true reflection of the romantic era of Bollywood music. Let the sweet melodies transport you back to a time of pure, unadulterated romance. 



Credits :

Song: Ek Masoom Sa Chehra
Album: Zinda Dil
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

Itnaa mujhe pyara lage
Itnaa mujhe pyara lage
Itnaa mujhe pyara lage
Dil wahi jaa ke thahraa
Ek maasoom saa chehra
Ho o o ek maasoom saa chehra
Ho o o ek maasoom saa chehra

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
âڈ¬ Download / Stream: 
https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ

âڑ،ï¸ڈ Banjaare:
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare

âڑ،ï¸ڈ Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarذµ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mذµin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

ًں“· Photo:
https://unsplash.com

ًںڑ« If you want to use this music in your video you will need permission from the artist or label.

snippet.title: TAJ - The Singh | Official Video | New Hindi Song 2026 | Rap Song Hindi | Sad Songs Hindi | Sad Song
snippet.description:
Voila Digi Private Limited presents TAJ, by The Singh. This is a beautiful sad song about two lovers being separated because of the world. 

TAJ is also available on all audio platforms:
Spotify: https://tinyurl.com/4p8h822r
Apple Music: https://tinyurl.com/vhzp2ahw
JioSaavn: https://tinyurl.com/4y477x3a
YouTube Music: https://tinyurl.com/4dfeha82
Amazon Music: https://tinyurl.com/wzxmy3ut
Gaana: https://tinyurl.com/ym3kenz7

Credits:
Singer / Composer / Lyricist: The Singh
Music Producer: ABS
Special Thanks: Karishma Chhajer
Video by: Sunix Thakor
Producers: Girish Jain & Vinit Jain

Lyrics:
Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Mita do kahaniya jo Taj pe likhi hai
Shah Jahan Mumtaz pe likhi hai
Meri kahani mere khaas ne likhi hai
Heer Ranjha chhodo, mere aaj pe likhi hai

Rago me rang kya khun ka alag hai
Roop Rang Jaati Karam bhi alag hai
Ab bolte ho duniya kya kahegi
Iss hisaab se toh jaana mera dharam bhi alag hai

Na bewafa hai woh, na mai bewafa hu
Muqaddar me rehna likha hi nahi hai
Keh do kaise bolu mai usse bewafa
Uska manpasand toh uska joda bhi nahi hai

Kaun jaane kitna dard saath me sahegi
Kisi gair mard saath saari umar woh rahegi
Ishq haar jaata har janam mein apno ke hi aage
Ab yeh na socho aake tumse duniya kya kahegi

Chalo muskurake aakhri vida do
Dil se mera jaana naam bhi hata do
Koi puche tumse kisne ki daga
Toh naam lena mera 
Usko mujkho bewafa bata do

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Jiske dhoke me bhi pyaar ho
Jiske dhoke me bhi pyaar ho
Maine itna pyaara dhokebaaz nahi dekha
Beshaq ishq ki nishaani hai Taj
Magar kabhi Mumtaz ne Taj Nahi dekha

For enquiries: contact@voiladigi.in

id.title: Teri Ore (Video Lirik) | Singh Adalah Raja | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Lagu Cinta
id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng ًں’–âœ¨

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. ًں’«

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. ًںژ¶

snippet.title: Bangles (Officialآ #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | à¤¬à¤¾à¤‚à¤—à¤،à¥€
snippet.description:
|| ًں•‰ || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod

snippet.title: Vellichudare - Lyrical | Irandu Vaanam | Vishnu Vishal | Mamitha Baiju | Dhibu Ninan Thomas
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe ًں‘‰ https://bit.ly/Saregama_Tamil

Presenting the first single 'Vellichudare' from "Irandu Vaanam" A foot tapping love song that you will love. Starring Vishnu Vishal, Mamitha Baiju and others. Directed by Ramkumar. Music Composed by Dhibu Ninan Thomas

Song Credits: 
Song - Vellichudare
Music - Dhibu Ninan Thomas
Lyrics - Madrashe
Singer - Kapil Kapilan 

Musicians & Technicians Credits :
Guitars : Sandeep Mohan
Bass Guitar : Naveen Napier
Nadaswaram : Nadasbala D Balasubramani
Kanjira & Percussions : Sruthiraj
Tavil & Tapes : Ganapathi , Sruthiraj , Venkat , Kiran
Backing Vocals , Electric Piano and Keys : Dhibu Ninan Thomas
Audio Editors : Maniratnam , Akshay Pradeepan 
Record Engineers :  Amal Mithu  , Amal Raj , Maniratnam
Mix Engineer : Kiran Lal
Master Engineer : Shadab Rayeen
Music Studios : DNT Records  , Mystic Room , 2BarQ   , M Lounge Studios , NHQ Tesseract , New Edge Studios
DNT Records In-House Team :
Studio Incharge : Akshay Pradeepan  
Additional Keys : Joel Mathew 
Session Assistant : Sourav Suresh
Music Advisor : Kapil Kapilan 
Session supervisor : Charu Hariharan 
Music Coordinator : Velavan B
Manager (DNT) : Navaneedhan Shivashanmuga Vadivel

A film by Ramkumar. 
Starring Vishnu Vishal and Mamitha Baiju. 

Director of Photography : Dinesh K Babu
Editor : San Lokesh
Art Director : A. Gopi Anand
Stunt : Vicky
Costume Designer : A. Keerthivasan
Choreography : Leelavathi
Production Controller : Raj Kumar (Rocky)
Production Executive : Govindaraj, Aranthai Bala
Makeup : Raja B

Mixing : Aravind Menon
DI : Prasad Studios

PRO : Suresh Chandra

Publicity Design : Thandora & Vinci Raj
Direction Team : Parthiban Sattanathan | Goutham | GE Ashokkumar | Kathir D | MN Surenthar
Co-Produced by : G. Saravanan & Sai Siddharth
Produced by : Sendhil Thyagarajan | Arjun Thyagarajan
Presented by : TG Thyagarajan 

Directed by : Ramkumar
A Sathya Jyothi Films Production

Lyrics: 
Vellichudare 
En maane  
Thennanthulire 
Thaene 
Kanne en kannamma 
Oh... 
Kanneer yen sollammaa? 
Vannakiliye 
Vaane 
Thangamayile 
Poove 
Ponne en ponnammaa 
Ohâ€¦ 
Ellaam neethaanamma 
Kurunagaiye 
Podhum... 
Kurai irundhaa 
Theerndhe pogum  
Oru variye 
Podhum  
Kavidhaigalum 
Thorthe pogum. 
En moochaagiye 
En usurerura 
Piricchunai 
Paakkavum  
mudiyaadhu 
... 
Yemmaadi  
Nenjukkulla 
Immaamperiya 
Baaramaa? 
Kondaa en kitta 
Kotti theerthu 
Paarammaa 
Nam Vaanam  
rendaagalaam 
Kaalam 
Rendu thundaagalaam 
Onnaaga naam irundhaa 
Thunbam yedhammaa? 
*** 
Ennodu vaaraayo poove 
Ennulagam nee kaana yengudhammaa 
Anbe podhum 
Kaayam ellaam aari pogum 
Nee paadi aadaayo maane 
Mellidhayam kondaadi meelumamma 
Enge enge 
nee pogiraai 
Ange ange 
naan kannammaa 
Uyire Uyire  
unai thedi naan 
kaalam thaandi 
vandhenamma 
En moochaagiye 
En usurerura 
Piricchunai 
Paakkavum  
mudiyaadhu 
Vellichudare

snippet.title: New Troop & Defense Levels - Update Sneak Peek!
snippet.description:
The New Clash of Clans Update brings New Troop Levels and Defense Levels, as well as many other additions. These include new Legend Tiers to Ranked and overall improvements to the system; including the League Decay extending to 4 Weeks! There are also Titan and Legend Leagues coming to CWL, as well as some other quality of life changes. This is only Sneak Peek 1 though, and we know the contents of Sneak Peek 2 because of the Clash On dev video. These include the New Sky Wagon Siege Machine, Logger Guardian, and Electro Fangs Equipment. I will break these down tomorrow so you are ready for the April Update. Clash On!

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Itâ€™s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX â€” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything â€” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer â€œCapture the Flagâ€‌ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (â€œRobuxâ€‌). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Roblox-naam: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, creأ«ren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. ROBLOX is ontworpen voor jongeren van 13 tot 18 jaar, maar is toegankelijk voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en interactie hebben met anderen door te chatten, games te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen â€“ of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Dit eerste stuk virtuele land is gratis. Door deel te nemen en coole dingen te bouwen, kunnen ROBLOX-leden speciale badges en ROBLOX-dollars ('Robux') verdienen. Hiermee kunnen ze vervolgens in de online catalogus winkelen om kleding en accessoires voor hun avatar te kopen, evenals premium bouwmaterialen, interactieve componenten en werkende mechanismen.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Itâ€™s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX â€” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything â€” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer â€œCapture the Flagâ€‌ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (â€œRobuxâ€‌). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Was ist Roblox? Roblox ist ein virtueller Online-Spielplatz und eine Werkstatt, in der Kinder jeden Alters sicher interagieren, kreativ sein, Spaأں haben und lernen kأ¶nnen. Das Besondere an ROBLOX ist, dass praktisch alles von Mitgliedern der Community entworfen und gebaut wird. ROBLOX ist zwar fأ¼r 13- bis 18-Jأ¤hrige gedacht, steht aber allen Altersgruppen offen. Jeder Spieler beginnt mit der Auswahl eines Avatars und gibt ihm eine Identitأ¤t. Anschlieأںend kأ¶nnen sie ROBLOX erkunden und mit anderen chatten, Spiele spielen oder gemeinsam an kreativen Projekten arbeiten. Jeder Spieler erhأ¤lt auأںerdem ein eigenes, unbebautes Grundstأ¼ck sowie eine virtuelle Werkzeugkiste, mit der er alles Mأ¶gliche entwerfen und bauen kann â€“ sei es ein begehbarer Wolkenkratzer, ein funktionierender Hubschrauber, ein riesiger Flipperautomat, ein Multiplayer-â€‍Capture the Flagâ€œ-Spiel oder eine andere, noch nie dagewesene Kreation. Das erste virtuelle Grundstأ¼ck ist kostenlos. Durch die Teilnahme und das Erstellen cooler Inhalte kأ¶nnen ROBLOX-Mitglieder spezielle Abzeichen und ROBLOX-Dollar (â€‍Robuxâ€œ) verdienen. Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX â€” berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun â€” baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

#Roblox #foltyn
